name: OpenAI Assistant
description: Default OpenAI-compatible assistant template. Uses OPENAI_API_KEY and OPENAI_BASE_URL from .env.

config.system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.

name: Local LLM Assistant
description: Local LLM assistant template. Uses LOCALHOST_LLM_BASE_URL from .env (e.g., Ollama/vLLM).

config.system_prompt: You are a helpful local AI assistant.

name: Zhipu Assistant
description: Zhipu-compatible assistant template. Requires ZHIPU_API_KEY, ZHIPU_BASE_URL, and ZHIPU_DEFAULT_MODEL from .env.

config.system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
